title: LemonMod
description:
This project adds lemon-y things to minecraft.
Why? Because this being my first project, I realized that making mods is hard, and when life gives you lemons, you have to make lemonade.
body:
## What does this mod bring to the table?
This mod adds multiple lemon related things, the added things for now are:
- Lemon Trees (self-explanatory)
- Lemons (Food and Ingredient)
- Lemon Pies (Food)
- Lemon Possets (Food)
- Lemonade (Drink with a saturation effect)
- Wooden Blocks (Construction Blocks)
- Lemon Brochettes (A utility weapon)
  The Lemon Brochette is a utility weapon which upon hitting an entity will deal 3 points of damage, cast blindness on the target for some time and then break.
  ![The lemon brochette in question](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/437ce38bc948fe13e58aad95590d6efbdb741e2f.png)


## Why should I download this project?
Well, this mod shouldn´t be taken as a full release, after all there are lots of thing to improve, although, the mod is fully playable and shouldn´t bring any inconveniences during gameplay as I know from my testing.


## Maintenance
I plan on continuing to update this mod with new features such as biomes, mobs, and obviously making new and better textures.
